parameters.apprise_url_plus: smtp2go://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }/
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own SMTP2Go destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise smtp2go:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native SMTP2GO v3 email/send payload delivered straight to api.smtp2go.com.
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to SMTP2GO v3 email/send (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment SMTP2GO destinations, direct

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SMTP2Go apikey

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SMTP2Go host

user_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SMTP2Go user
